introSection: Saven is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Fårup Sommerland in Blokhus, Nordjylland, Denmark. Saven is Danish for Saw.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Saven was scheduled to open on 2 May 2020, but the coronavirus pandemic caused the opening to be delayed. However, it opened a month later on 5 June 2020.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Saven has a custom layout and features a tunnel.

fullText:
Saven is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Fårup Sommerland in Blokhus, Nordjylland, Denmark. Saven is Danish for Saw.

Saven was scheduled to open on 2 May 2020, but the coronavirus pandemic caused the opening to be delayed. However, it opened a month later on 5 June 2020.

Saven has a custom layout and features a tunnel.
